home.description: An elegant desktop for AI provider orchestration.

sidebar.empty: No chat sessions yet. Click New Chat in the top-right to start.
sidebar.emptyProjects: No project entries yet. Use the add project button to create your first project chat.

projectMenu.archiveChatsDescription: Archive all active chats for "{{projectName}}"? The project will disappear from the sidebar until a new chat is created for this folder.
projectMenu.removeDescription: Remove "{{projectName}}" and delete its local chats from this app? The project folder on disk will not be deleted.

home.hint: Open Settings to finish the workspace setup while chat is still being wired.
home.mockedNotice: New Chat is using a local mock for now. The real conversation flow is not connected yet.

appIcon.description: Choose your preferred app icon for the dock, taskbar, and tray.
appIcon.title: App Icon

approvals.description: Review agent tool approvals that are still waiting for a response.
approvals.title: Approval Inbox

autoLoadWorkspaceRules.description: Read AGENTS.md, or CLAUDE.md as a fallback, from the project root for every agent turn.
autoLoadWorkspaceRules.label: Load workspace rules automatically

allowSubagentDelegation.description: Let specialist prompts include the active roster so a subagent can hand work to a better fit.
allowSubagentDelegation.label: Allow subagent delegation

enabled.description: Expose managed agent tools to chat routing. When off, chat stays on the plain model path.
enabled.label: Enable managed agents

permissionMode.description: How new sessions gate agent tools: Default approves edits and commands, Accept edits auto-runs in-project edits, and Bypass runs everything. Switch per session in the composer.
permissionMode.label: Default permission mode

option.acceptEdits: Accept edits — auto-run edits, approve commands

requireApprovalForWrites.description: Keep patch and command writes behind explicit approval even for write-capable profiles.
requireApprovalForWrites.label: Require approval for writes

retryTransientFailures.description: Automatically retry transient provider, network, timeout, and tool failures before surfacing a manual decision.
retryTransientFailures.label: Retry transient failures

maxAutomaticRetries.description: Applied to tool execution and run graph nodes.
maxAutomaticRetries.label: Automatic retries

agents.description: Managed profiles sit above raw tool calls. Chat remains the main viewport; this only changes the runtime lane, tool budget, and event trace.

editor.description: Override the active profile name, summary, and runtime constraints.

instructions.label: Additional instructions
instructions.placeholder: Add constraints that only apply to this profile.

readonly.description: When enabled, this profile will not expose write or check tools.
readonly.label: Read-only mode

editor.title: Profile override

active.description: Built-in profiles available for chat routing.
active.label: Active profiles

custom.description: Custom profiles layered on top of the built-in crew.
custom.label: Custom profiles

delegation.description: Profiles that can hand work to a narrower specialist.
delegation.label: Delegation lanes

preview.description: This is the summary used by chat routing when a request enters the managed agent lane.
preview.title: Routing Preview

coder.description: Implements small, bounded changes with validation.
coder.name: Coder

explore.description: Explores the codebase and locates relevant files.
explore.name: Explore

generalPurpose.description: Default chat and lightweight project analysis.
generalPurpose.name: General Purpose

harnessOperator.description: Inspects agent runs, events, and harness behavior.
harnessOperator.name: Harness Operator

plan.description: Turns goals into scoped plans and implementation slices.
plan.name: Plan

review.description: Reviews diffs and finds behavioral risks.
review.name: Review

roster.description: Pick the default profile used when chat enters agent mode.
roster.title: Crew roster

agents.title: Agents

autoCompact.description: Automatically compress older conversation history when the chat approaches the context window limit.

enabled.description: Compress older messages before they crowd out new context.
enabled.label: Enable Auto Compact

keepRecentMessages.description: Recent messages to always keep in full. These messages are not compressed into the summary (2-20).
keepRecentMessages.label: Keep Recent Messages

threshold.description: When estimated context usage exceeds this percentage, older messages are compacted. Lower values leave more buffer, while higher values preserve more original content.
threshold.label: Compaction Threshold: {{value}}%

autoCompact.title: Auto Compact

chat.description: Configure chat response rendering, history compression, and context preservation.

animation.description: Animation only runs while an assistant response is streaming. Completed responses drop the extra animation nodes.
animation.label: Streaming Animation

blurIn.description: Better for fast models because it softens batched token arrivals.
blurIn.label: Blur In

fadeIn.description: A light fade close to Streamdown's default behavior.
fadeIn.label: Fade In

none.description: Disable text motion and keep stable Markdown rendering only.
none.label: No Animation

slideUp.description: A subtle upward entrance that emphasizes new content.
slideUp.label: Slide Up

typewriter.description: Character-level fade for a stronger streaming feel.
typewriter.label: Typewriter

streamdown.description: Render assistant Markdown with Streamdown and tune the streaming response motion.
streamdown.title: Markdown Rendering

chat.title: Chat

delete.description: Delete "{{name}}" from custom themes? This change will be part of your unsaved settings until you save.
delete.title: Delete Custom Theme

customThemes.description: Create and manage your own custom color schemes.

dialog.description: Design your own color scheme with 4 core colors and a live UI preview.
dialog.title: Create Custom Theme

editor.advancedHint: Switch to Advanced mode to fine-tune individual colors.
editor.simpleDescription: Pick 4 colors and we'll generate a complete preview for you.

empty.description: No custom themes yet. Click "Create Theme" to get started.
empty.title: No custom themes

customThemes.title: Custom Themes

dark.description: Choose the color schema used when dark mode is active.
dark.label: Dark Mode

colorScheme.description: Pick separate color schemes for light and dark modes. Default keeps the current built-in theme.

light.description: Choose the color schema used when light mode is active.
light.label: Light Mode

proPresets.description: Apply a HeroUI Pro theme pair to both light and dark modes.
proPresets.label: HeroUI Pro Presets

colorScheme.title: Color Scheme

family.description: Select a font for the application interface. Leave it as System Default to use your OS font.
family.label: Font Family

language.description: Choose the language used across the application interface.
language.label: Application Language
language.title: Language

memory.description: Store compact long-term memory outside the model context so chat sessions, projects, and the Telegram bridge can share relevant recall.

embedding.defaultDescription: Leave empty to use the default embedding model.
embedding.description: The embedding model used for semantic search. Leave empty to use the default (text-embedding-3-small).
embedding.localDescription: Use a local embedding model for semantic search.
embedding.title: Embedding Model

includeChatbot.description: Let chatbot conversations read from and write to the same long-term memory store.
includeChatbot.label: Connect chatbot memory

delete.description: This memory entry will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
delete.title: Delete this memory permanently?

manager.description: Browse, search, and permanently remove stored memory entries.
manager.title: Manage Memory

autoRetrieve.description: Automatically search and inject relevant memories before each conversation.
autoRetrieve.label: Auto Retrieve Memories

maxContextEntries.description: Controls how many matching memory entries can be injected into a model request.
maxContextEntries.label: Context entries

maxRetrievedMemories.description: Maximum number of relevant memories to inject into the conversation context (1-20).
maxRetrievedMemories.label: Max Retrieved Memories: {{count}}

queryRewriting.description: Use the Memory Tool Model to optimize your message before searching memories.
queryRewriting.label: Query Rewriting

similarityThreshold.description: Minimum similarity score required for a memory to be retrieved. Higher values mean stricter matching.
similarityThreshold.label: Similarity Threshold: {{value}}

shareAcrossProjects.description: Allow memory created in one project to be retrieved from another project when it matches the current request.
shareAcrossProjects.label: Share across projects

autoSummarize.description: Summarize conversations into durable decisions, facts, and procedures before writing memory.
autoSummarize.label: Memory Summarization

summarization.description: Use the Memory Tool Model to extract durable summaries, decisions, and facts.
summarization.title: Memory Summarization

memory.title: Long-Term Memory

toolModel.autoDescription: Choose a capable low-cost model from your enabled providers.
toolModel.description: Used for memory summarization, query rewriting, and auto compact summaries.
toolModel.label: Memory Tool Model

enable.description: After enabling, complete Cursor login and model sync on the Providers page.
enable.label: Enable {{name}}

models.description: This first pass syncs the built-in Cursor model list. The proxy runtime will reuse the same auth service.
models.title: Cursor Models

status.waiting: Complete Cursor authorization in the browser.

providers.description: Manage credentials, endpoints, and available models for built-in providers.

apiMode.description: Responses is OpenAI's default API. Switch to Chat Completions for OpenAI-compatible gateways that only implement the older endpoint.
apiMode.label: API Mode

error.unsupportedProtocol: Base URL must start with http:// or https://.

cursorAuth.description: Authorize through Cursor browser login. Tokens stay in main-process secret storage and are not written into regular settings.
cursorAuth.label: Cursor Login

region.description: Switch the official Moonshot domain used by the default Base URL.
region.label: Region

models.description: Select the models that should participate in runtime resolution.
models.title: Models

cursor.description: The Cursor provider is supplied by the built-in cursor-auth plugin, using Cursor subscription auth with model selection.

moonshot.description: Moonshot exposes Kimi models through an OpenAI-compatible API.

openai.description: OpenAI's official chat models, plus any OpenAI-compatible endpoint you configure with a custom Base URL.

zaiCodingPlan.description: Z.AI Coding Plan exposes GLM models for the Coding Plan subscription.

status.cursorNeedsLogin: Login to Cursor before syncing models.
status.cursorPluginDisabled: Enable the Cursor Auth plugin on the Plugins page first.
status.cursorReady: Cursor is authenticated and ready to sync selectable models.
status.fetching: Fetching models from the upstream Models API...
status.fetchSuccessEmpty: Fetch completed, but no models were returned.
status.needsApiKey: Add an API Key to fetch models and use this provider at runtime.
status.ready: This provider is ready to fetch models.

providers.title: Providers

projects.description: Group chat sessions by real local folders
projects.label: Projects

simple.description: Show a flat list sorted by recently opened
simple.label: Simple

skills.description: Parse global and project-level SKILL.md files and inject matching instructions into model context when relevant.

includeGlobal.description: Retrieve reusable instructions from global skills in the user profile.
includeGlobal.label: Global skills

includeProject.description: Retrieve project-specific instructions from the current chat session project.
includeProject.label: Project skills

maxContextSkills.description: Controls how many matching skills can be injected into a model request.
maxContextSkills.label: Context skills

skills.title: Skills

startup.description: Uses your system login items. Development builds may not support this until the app is packaged.
startup.title: Startup Settings

telegram.botFatherHint: Get your bot token from {{link}} on Telegram.
telegram.description: Connect a Telegram bot to local Etyon. It replies to authorized text messages with this channel's default model.

allowedChatIds.description: Optional. When set, only these chats are handled. Supports comma, space, or newline separators.
allowedChatIds.label: Allowed Chat IDs

allowedUserIds.description: Optional. When set, only these users are handled. telegram: and tg: prefixes are accepted.
allowedUserIds.label: Allowed User IDs

botUsername.description: Add {{bot}} to the target chat first. Telegram only shows a bot in @ suggestions after that bot is already in the chat.
botUsername.label: Bot Username

defaultModel.description: Leave this on global default unless Telegram should use a different model.
defaultModel.label: Default Model
defaultModel.unavailable: This configured model is not currently available.

requireMentionInGroups.description: In groups and supergroups, reply only when the bot username is mentioned.
requireMentionInGroups.label: Require @bot in groups

status.savedSettingsOnly: Save settings to start or restart the Telegram bridge.

telegram.title: Telegram Bridge

approval.description: Route risky bash, cross-directory writes, network downloads, rm, and reset operations through explicit approval.
approval.title: Approval Gate

bash.description: Keep command, cwd, timeout, and reason as the core inputs. Mutating or network commands require approval.
bash.title: Bash Command

fileContext.description: Split file read, rg search, project snapshots, and Git diff into read-only tools with token budgets and summaries.
fileContext.title: Read / Search

fileMutation.description: Write through a patch tool with diff preview, visible tool result, and follow-up test guidance.
fileMutation.title: Edit / Patch

rtk.description: Send shell work through RTK first, keep a raw-output escape hatch, and feed savings back into this panel.
rtk.title: RTK Command Router

toolLoop.description: Use AI SDK ToolLoopAgent or streamText with stopWhen for multi-step tool calls and typed results.
toolLoop.title: ToolLoopAgent

agentTools.description: Current tool surface proposal for a local code agent, grounded in AI SDK tool calling and terminal-agent permission models.
agentTools.title: Code Agent Tool Plan

byCommand.description: Top RTK command groups by total tokens saved.
byCommand.empty: No command savings are available yet.
byCommand.title: Savings by Command

control.description: Rewrite supported bash commands immediately before execution while keeping approvals and command history based on the original command.
control.title: RTK Command Handling

daily.description: Tokens saved per active day from RTK daily statistics.
daily.empty: No daily savings are available yet.
daily.title: Daily Savings

overview.description: Global token savings from RTK command output compression.
overview.title: RTK Compression Overview

recent.empty: No recent commands are available yet.
recent.title: Recent Commands

windowBehavior.description: Choose whether minimize and close actions should hide the app to the system tray.
windowBehavior.title: Window Behavior
